textByHash.629d58d4e1c03b914bbdba3456fb21105b102599: Welcome to Frankie's Fish Emporium, what can I do for you mate?
textByHash.71484333ab71d8e35da16d92529a96f2e502c315: We serve the finest fresh fish Piscarilius has to offer.
textByHash.76a2fe56311745ecd4a4e8805de1364edaaabd27: I trade the finest fish in Piscarilius. In this city you get two choices, fishing or thuggery. I've kept afloat without resorting to the latter, not something which can be said by many of the folk around here.
